src: 📈 React Native ECharts Library: An awesome charting library for React Native, built upon Apache ECharts and leveraging react-native-svg and react-native-skia. Offers significantly better performance compared to WebView-based solutions.
ja: React Native EChartsライブラリ：Apache EChartsをベースにreact-native-svgとreact-native-skiaを活用したReact Native向け高性能チャートライブラリ。WebViewベースのソリューションと比べて大幅に優れたパフォーマンスを提供
